canonical_definition: A baseline evaluation procedure where the model is trained for 30 epochs on the training sets across all languages and relations to compare against intervention-based methods.
papers: Extending Automatic Machine Translation Evaluation to Book-Length Documents
Mind the Gap: HowBabyLMs Learn Filler-Gap Dependencies
